hero.description: Trade products with trusted suppliers worldwide. Streamlined ordering, secure payments, and real-time tracking.

features.title: Why Choose IONE Center?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to manage your B2B ecommerce business.
features.secureTradingDesc: Enterprise-grade security with encrypted transactions and verified sellers.
features.globalMarketplaceDesc: Connect with suppliers and buyers across the globe in multiple languages.
features.fastProcessingDesc: Streamlined order processing with real-time status tracking.
features.financialToolsDesc: Comprehensive financial management with reports, tax, and reconciliation.
features.sellerNetworkDesc: Browse verified sellers with product catalogs and direct messaging.
features.supportDesc: Dedicated support team to help with orders, payments, and inquiries.

howItWorks.subtitle: Start trading in three simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Explore our vast catalog of products from verified suppliers around the world.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Place orders with flexible deposit options and multiple payment methods.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Monitor your orders in real-time from processing to delivery at your doorstep.

benefits.title: Built for B2B Trading Excellence
benefits.subtitle: Our platform is designed for B2B ecommerce, providing tools that streamline every aspect of your business.
